title: calicotome spinosa subsp. villosa
intro: Calicotome spinosa subsp. villosa, also known as the thorny calicotome, is a shrub plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as dyspepsia, and its leaves are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calicotome spinosa subsp. villosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
